taxonomy: Eriophyton anomalum is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. It belongs to the genus Eriophyton, which is a monotypic genus. The plant is native to India and is a part of the evergreen scrub vegetation. The classification of Eriophyton anomalum is further divided into the kingdom Plantae, followed by the subkingdom Angiospermophyta, and then the class Magnoliopsida. This classification is based on the plant's characteristics and its relationships with other species within the Lamiaceae family.
